node.title: Uber | Phone Screen | Union and Intersection of 2 Interval Lists

topic.title: Uber | Phone Screen | Union and Intersection of 2 Interval Lists

post.content:
Given two list of unsorted intervals `l1` and `l2` write 2 functions
1. OR (merge)
2. AND (intersection) 

**Example:**
```
Input: l1 = [[2, 4], [6, 8], [1, 3]], l2 = [[7, 9], [2, 5]]
Output:
OR => [[1, 5], [6, 9]]
AND => [[2, 4], [7, 8]]
```

@sach323 said in [Uber Phone Interview](/post/220425):
> 
> 
> 		

The And function means the overall intersection between the two lists?

For example:
    The intersection between (1, 3), (2, 4) and (1, 5) should be (2, 3)?
